mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_keys (id, user_id, api_key, name, is_active) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{apiKey}, #{name}, #{isActive})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, api_key AS apiKey, name, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM api_keys WHERE api_key = #{apiKey} AND is_active = 1
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, api_key AS apiKey, name, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM api_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
